device_name: CS-series-FP Radiographic / Fluoroscopic Systems with Optional CA-100S / FluoroShield (ROI Assembly)
intended_use: The Omega Medical Imaging, LLC CS-series-FP (SSXI) systems with optional accessory device CA-100S as a modification device to provide an automated Region of interest that reduces exposure to the patie
intended_use_full: The Omega Medical Imaging, LLC CS-series-FP (SSXI) systems with optional accessory device CA-100S as a modification device to provide an automated Region of interest that reduces exposure to the patient and operator. The system is intended for use in Radiographic/fluoroscopic applications including cardiac, vascular, general radiographic/fluoroscopic diagnostic, and interventional x-ray imaging for General Populations.
target_condition: Radiographic/fluoroscopic imaging procedures including cardiac, vascular, general radiographic/fluoroscopic diagnostic, and interventional x-ray imaging
ground_truth: Dose Area Product (DAP) meter measurements and Landauer Luxel personal dosimetry badges for scatter radiation measurement
other_metrics: Dose reduction: up to 61.8% in patients and 59.4% to staff; bench testing with DAP meter measurements
